title: The Heart of Gold Demo
description: The Heart of Gold: Demo is an Hybrid Bullet Heaven-JRPG game, where each character is unique thanks to their own abilities, progression, and combat style. Upgrade your equipment, evolve your weapons, collect cards, and survive hordes of enemies in a colorful world full of secrets and challenges.

title: lily's world XD Demo
description: Lily was an ordinary teenager in 2004, and you just found her laptop. Read her diary, message her friends, and piece together what happened to her before it’s too late. But you're not the only one with access to her computer… Play the first chapter of Lily’s story in this demo.

title: Fields of Aaru Demo
description: A cozy life sim set in the mystical afterlife of Ancient Egypt. Farm along the Nile, befriend the locals, and decorate your eternal home. Venture into the desert and discover oases, pyramids, and tombs. Unlock magical powers by restoring ancient obelisks and making offerings to the gods.

title: Portabellows Demo
description: Explore a whimsical island to find… pie recipes?! Bake them by gathering or growing ingredients, which may be the key to helping out your new found quirky friends leave the island! In this wholesome 3D platformer collectathon, you can enjoy discovering the world freely at your own pace.

title: Burger Bois Demo
description: Become Patty, the accidental owner of a failing food business. Craft tasty (or nasty) burgers, discover new ingredients, and work hard(ish) to redeem your reputation on the way to the best parking spot of all time. Play with your food in this cozy food truck simulator!

title: Art Studio Simulator Demo
description: Bring your wildest imagination to life in your art studio. Paint, sell, build your own gallery, and invite friends to admire your art.

title: Colossus - Eternal Blight Demo
description: Your brother is corrupted. The Blight is spreading. Only you can stop it. Colossus is an atmospheric pixel action-adventure where you master precise combat, explore a vast dark fantasy world, and make choices that permanently scar the kingdom of Eireos.

title: Sanctus Wars Demo
description: Sanctus Wars is a small indie dark fantasy action game. Summon hellish units, cast spells, grow your heroine, and defend the portal against waves of enemies.

title: Plush Rangers Demo
description: Survive waves of wacky mutated constructs to defeat powerful bosses with your team of Plushie friends in this quirky chaotic Survivors-like. Earn merit badges to unlock new Plushies, relics, items, and upgrades.

title: T.W.I.R.L. Demo
description: It's 3am in your childhood home. Everyone's asleep, but you. Sneak out of your room and do as you're told - "T.W.I.R.L." - whatever that means.

title: In The Mist of War Demo
description: In the Mist of War is a turn-based online PvP strategy game. Select your units, position them strategically, and outsmart your opponent in a tactical top-down fog-of-war battle.

title: Plant Game Demo
description: A short run-based survival game where you grow a plant with limited perception, unlock sensors to read the environment, and reach a bloom/death reveal that shows what your run created.

title: Incremental Stand Demo
description: Incremental Stand is an incremental strategy tower defense game where you scavenge resources with your cursor, place survivors through a city overrun by zombies, fight zombies, and grow stronger through a skill tree and powerful upgrades.

title: Labyrinth Demo
description: Climb a 100-floor Labyrinth in a third-person anime action RPG featuring skill-based combat, persistent progression, powerful build customization, and Epic Boss encounters every 10 floors.

title: Quantum Quartz Demo
description: Steampunk pixel-art precision platformer where you toggle platforms on and off using colored crystals. With only one active at a time, each grants a different movement ability, changing how you move and how the level works, blending high-skill platforming with spatial puzzles.

title: Chess Pawn Demo
description: Chess Pawn is a fun puzzle-platformer in which the hero dreams of becoming a king. Your goal is to claim the royal crown, but along the way you’ll have to eliminate the competition… by knocking your opponents off the board.

title: Billion Egg Farm Demo
description: Billion Egg Farm is a first-person automation game where you put chickens to work laying eggs and build production lines for eggs, meat, and processed goods.

title: Tiny Capsule Collector Demo
description: Run a cozy capsule shop at the bottom of your screen. Attract cute animal customers, collect charming capsule toys, and build a relaxing, ambient world in this idle sim bringing you small moments of joy while you work. Make your desktop a place you’d rather be.

title: DVD Dealer Simulator Prologue
description: Build and manage your own DVD game store in DVD Dealer Simulator. Buy, sell, and trade game discs, expand your inventory, upgrade your shop, and move to bigger locations as your business grows. Turn a small store into a thriving gaming retail empire.

title: CatCha Demo
description: Discover CatCha a Cozy and Roguelike solo game for PC. Take care of your cats, decorate multiple rooms in the Cat-Castle and play the strategic Dice Builder Rogulike!

title: Minibus Simulator Demo
description: Manage your own minibus route through the narrow streets of the city. Transport passengers, load luggage, monitor your fuel, and complete your route while staying alert for police inspections.

title: Neat Demo
description: Feeling overwhelmed? Hi, I’m Molly. I help people sort their space, organize their belongings, and bring calm back into their lives. Let’s take it one object at a time and make everything feel neat again. Tell me your story. I’m here to listen.

title: AstroDig Demo
description: Mine, defend, and profit across planets. Expand your operation, survive enemy waves, and discover dangerous hidden worlds in this minimalist sci-fi strategy shooter.

title: Lezarishia Stories  Trial Version
description: "Lezarishia Stories" is a classic command-based JRPG set in a 2.5D world that blends pixel art and 3D visuals. Pursue the stolen Holy Sword and set out on a grand retro-fantasy adventure with a cast of memorable companions!

title: Gardens Of Lutonia Demo
description: Gardens of Lutonia is a contemplative druidic sandbox. Terra-farm a world with your harp-staff and your cat, freeze plants mid-growth to compose living patterns, or build your own dungeon-gardens in the Map Editor. No combat. Just vibes. 🌿

title: Blighthold Demo
description: Blighthold is a 2D city builder set in a Lovecraftian-Dieselpunk world. Reclaim the lost city and its Eldritch Tree. Suffer through moral dilemmas that will shape your society. Defend against abominations and uncover the terrible secret that lies below.

title: NoodlePunk Demo
description: Forced into a corporate-mandated work program, you run a cyberpunk noodle shop to pay off a crushing debt. Prepare orders fast, manage your ingredients, and upgrade your operation while keeping up with relentless customer drones.

title: AKIBA LOST Demo
description: Thirteen years ago, six girls vanished in Akihabara in the unsolved case “The Akiba Vanishing”. Daiki Shinjo announces a live-action game based on the incident, gathering six women who embody Akihabara’s subculture. But their story begins to seep into reality. Can AKIBA LOST be finished?

title: GENERAL IDLER Demo
description: Experience the thrill of global conquest with a limited demo of GENERAL IDLER. Train your army, conquer neighboring nations, and unlock a taste of strategic gameplay. Will you make the right moves to expand your empire? Your path to global control begins now!

title: Undying Flame Demo
description: Survive a minimalist wave-survival rogue-lite. Keep the fire alive. Read its flame. Defend your fire against creatures that crawl from the dark across endless waves. Every wave survived, the fire grows. Over time, it consumes everything.

title: Chaos Coin Demo
description: Your coins are your actions in this roguelike coinbuilder. Plan your turns to shove, evade, and attack your foes in tactical lane-based combat. Upgrade coins with new faces unique to every character to build complex combos. The forces of Chaos are coming…so use your heads (and tails)!

title: Zap Blastum Demo
description: Robots have invaded your planet, and they don't even see you as a threat. Beat the odds and SAVE THE GALAXY in the FREE DEMO of this twin-stick cover shooter with lock-on targeting!

title: Bittersweet Blossoms Demo
description: A lesbian romance set in England shortly after WWI. The story centres around Dot, a young maid who begins to work in the crumbling stately home of Bly, and her young mistress: the devious, devilish Patience.

title: Foxy Dumplings Demo
description: In Foxy Dumplings, you’ll run your own food truck and make friends along the way. Cook dumplings from all over the world, take good care of your clients, and discover how a meal can mend more than just hunger in this cozy cooking sim. Rise to the top of Foxtagram, one heartfelt dish at a time.

title: Data Center Simulator Demo
description: Step into a realistic first-person data center simulator. Badge in, diagnose faults, replace hardware, configure networks, and manage critical infrastructure. 45 training scenarios across 9 categories teach real-world skills that prepare you for data center technician careers.

title: 50 Years Classic Demo
description: 50 Years Classic is a minimalist turn-based strategy game where you can choose from a variety of nations, each with its own unique feature. The game offers fast, engaging gameplay with high replayability. This is a demo version.

title: Penguin Colony Demo
description: Cosmic horror, through the eyes of a penguin. Rival human factions have come to your home in the Antarctic, seeking an ancient and inconceivable being. Observe their descent into insanity in this faithful re-imagining of H.P. Lovecraft’s At the Mountains of Madness, and other stories.

title: Game About Breaking A Cube Demo
Hellsino Pokerlike Demo
description: Stop playing blind luck. This is tactical grid combat. Deploy cards onto a ruthless 5x3 board to trigger overlapping horizontal and vertical sets. Master the Nexus Multiplier to unleash massive triple damage combos, outsmart a rigged house, and save your soul from absolute bankruptcy.

title: Mechs V Kaijus 2 Demo
description: Mechs V Kaijus 2 is an Hybrid Tower/Base defense, with army vs army (tug of war style) tactics. From the cockpit of a mech, to build a huge base with Reactors, Mines and all type of tower army factories and super weapons.

title: Lucky Punk Demo
description: We've distilled the roguelike deckbuilder into one simple choice: Draw or Stop. Push your luck and beat the odds in the vibrant post-apocalypse. Gather supplies and build your community. Survive and thrive in a vibrant eco-dystopia… or don’t. 1% chance. 100% choice. Do you feel lucky, P

title: Litany Demo
description: Litany is a roguelike deckbuilder where you play multiple units, craft a hyper-synergistic group, and trigger results that should not exist. Pick a character, open boosters, upgrade cards, and craft a powerful combination that breaks the numbers!

title: Endless Rails Demo
description: Endless Rails is an isometric bullet heaven roguelite where you defeat hordes of monsters with your drones to protect your train as it rolls through the wasteland.

title: Spyder: Agent 8 Demo
description: Save the world as Agent 8, a robot spider superspy! Crawl across walls, ceilings, and floors, and use built-in gadgets to solve fun environmental puzzles in this brand-new, family-friendly adventure from the BAFTA Award-winning studio Sumo Digital.

title: Interstitial Demo
description: Demo for the Prologue of Interstitial!

title: How to Grow Your Sausage Demo
description: Every [key]stroke makes your sausage bigger. Let it sit in the corner of your screen and watch it grow while you use your computer. Feed it different meats, upgrade your butcher, and see the magic happen. Have you ever dreamed of growing your sausage? Now it’s finally possible!

title: GAP OR DIE Demo
description: There’s only one rule: make the jump. Push your speed, commit to the gap, and survive as long as you can in this high-risk endless racing game. Upgrade your ride, and see how far you can go before everything goes horribly wrong.

title: CLEARANCE: S-7 Demo
description: November 1989, Czechoslovakia. As a secret-police officer you descend into the hidden facility Š-7, ordered to burn the archives and silence the witnesses. But no one down there is still alive — only corpses, tapes, and things that used to be people. A retro survival horror about guilt and memory.

title: ARCWATT: Power Empire Demo
description: Plan, power, and protect a city that runs on the grid you build. Place producers, balance demand, survive storms and surges.

title: Zombies & Battery Demo
description: A sound-driven co-op survival game for up to 4 players. Sneak past zombies that hunt by sound, manage hunger and injuries, scavenge supplies, and repair a vehicle to escape. Every action makes noise, and every run takes place in a procedurally generated map.

title: Galdromeda Demo
description: Turn-based RPG with space combat. Assemble a crew, each having their own unique abilities, level up, upgrade your ship and your crew's abilities, collect new outfits for your crew.

title: Friendly Steps Demo
description: A physics-based 1-4 player co-op disaster about getting home after a wild night out. It was a fun night! Now grab your buddies and walk home. IF YOU REMEMBER HOW.

title: False Hero Demo
description: False Hero is a fast-paced soulslike adventure where you steal your enemies’ attacks and chain them into deadly combos. Explore the corrupted Land of the Gods and put your combat skills to the true test in challenging boss fights. Will you fight for the Gods or become an apostle of Death?

title: Glowy Demo
description: Glowy is a minimal yet atmospheric puzzle experience where light is both your only guide, and your greatest fear. In this journey through a mind trapped between light and darkness, you’ll help a fragile being rediscover who they truly are.

title: Goblins for Good Demo
description: A short incremental game about growing a goblin army, merging them into massive units, and unleashing comedic, wholesome chaos — all while supporting real-world good. 90% of profits are donated to charity, and players vote in-game for which charity they want their money to support.

title: Kamikaze Survivors Demo
description: Survive waves of kamikaze attackers as battleships from the World Wars of last century to the present in this turret-based Roguelite. Gain equipment from underway replenishment and pick up admirals from history to increase the power of your ship.

title: Age After Age Demo
description: Age After Age. Build a thriving settlement, shape society across multiple eras, and dominate a living world economy. Choose your path - classic history, Steampunk, Gothic, and more in a deep city-building strategy with evolving logistics, citizen classes, diplomacy, and research.

title: Hakoniwa Electric Demo
description: "Hakoniwa Electric" is a cute relaxing puzzle game. Explore adorable isometric stages, solve puzzles, and light them up. Why not spend a leisurely year as Akari, who's taken over grandpa's electronics shop, helping with the monthly troubles from the townsfolk?

title: MEGAKO☆PUNCH! Demo
description: “MEGAKO☆PUNCHI!” is a fast-paced deck-building roguelite! Smash through hordes of overflowing monsters with your ultimate techniques and make your way back home!

title: City of Atlantis Demo
description: City of Atlantis is a survival city-builder where you rebuild the mythical city of Atlantis, manage a fragile economy, and fight for your people’s survival. Build, expand, protect your citizens from disasters, and face the wrath of ancient gods.

title: Maelor The Robot: Going Rogue Demo
description: Flip gravity on the fly, master a multi-stage jetpack, slingshot across massive gaps, and use weapon recoil to launch yourself through chaotic levels. Evolve your arsenal through use, fight aggressive enemies, and turn the environment itself into a weapon in this high-mobility sci-fi adventure.

title: Hypnagogia 壊れた夢 Broken Dreams: Demo
description: Hypnagogia: Broken Dreams is a surreal, first-person exploration game where you traverse various dream vignettes, interact with colorful characters, solve puzzles, and do some light platforming. In the demo, you'll experience the Dream Factory and Junk City worlds.

title: What The Dog Remembers Demo
description: A demo of What The Dog Remembers, a retro style psychological horror game. Survive a fixed seed playthrough of seven nights in a claustrophobic trailer. Spot reality breaking anomalies and report your findings. Two wrong calls in the same night means game over.

title: Marbs: Deluxe Demo
description: Marbs: Deluxe is a casual puzzle game where you link colourful Marbs to rack up huge combos, equip game-changing modifiers and score big! Give the demo a go with "Classic" mode and a limited "Deluxe" mode with 22 Marbifiers to play around with!

title: In Silent Walls :  Origines Demo
description: A first-person psychological horror demo. Explore a supposedly haunted place, use your flashlight and Ghost Box, collect clues, and uncover what is hiding behind the walls.

title: We Believe in No Gods (Demo)
description: Awaken as a forgotten deity in a post-apocalyptic wasteland ruled by staunch materialists. Listen to desperate prayers—bestow miracles or watch with cold indifference. Extract faith to survive, manipulate mortal minds, and shape the ultimate fate of a world where We Believe In No Gods.

title: S.A.N.D.Y. - Beach Cleaner Demo
description: This is a cozy, narrative and dark game in which you clean oil off the beach, sort out trash and rescue animals. Relaxing cleanup in a post-apocalyptic world.

title: Cosmic Crusher Demo
description: Incremental game about protecting solar system. Destroy asteroids with a huge arsenal of weapons, upgrade your skills through a massive skill tree, and defend the solar system from hostile alien fleets. How far can you go?

title: DragonSword : Awakening Demo
description: Explore Orbis, an anime-style open world built with Unreal Engine 5! Recruit a cast of unique companions, unleash spectacular status-effect tag-action combat, and embark on an epic journey to save the world from a dragon that has awakened for the first time in 60 years.

title: Charming Hill Demo
description: Charming Hill is a small experimental game where creating beautiful paintings feels easy and natural. No special skills are required to be an artist: it’s a space to relax, paint, and discover a warm story, or better yet, paint your own.

title: Food Truck Rush Demo
description: Run your food truck under pressure as impatient customers pile up. Serve fast, upgrade your equipment, and climb your way out of 100k debt by moving to richer locations. A fast-paced cooking and management game where speed, upgrades, and chaos decide your success.

title: SeaColony Demo
description: SeaColony is a base-building survival game set in the endless open sea. Build and expand a floating outpost, manage survivors, and set up production chains to keep your colony alive. Farm the ocean and trade with merchant ships to survive and grow in the harsh deep.

title: Celestial Routes Demo
description: Celestial Routes is a space exploration game in which players take on the role of galactic citizens, tasked with paying taxes and collaborate with the colonial and the galactic government authorities. And survive as an individual.

title: Valkyrie Raid Demo
description: Deliver devastating close air support while commanding a dynamic battlefield in this 2D action shooter with real-time strategy and roguelite progression.

title: Reflection Witch Demo
description: Reflection Witch is a new rougelike spin on classic brick-breaking games. Join a witch on her journey to uncover the secrets of the arcane, fighting brick-laden baddies by drawing lines to reflect and enchant your Magic Ball with powerful spells while simultaneously blocking incoming enemy attacks.

title: Life, the Universe, and Restaurants Demo
description: Run your own restaurant in a bizarre universe! Cook for the gods; deploy robot and build automated production lines. Experiment with different builds to win over divine appetites. Earn massive profits and create the #1 restaurant in the universe! Tip: Your chef's knife isn't just for cooking…

title: 魔律物语-韦德霍尔克学院 Demo
developer: 杭州达图雷网络科技有限公司

title: ケンナゲェル -SWORD FLINGER- Demo
description: Throw swords to fight in this roguelite chain-action game. Weapons bounce off walls and enemies, chaining hits from one foe to another. Build damage bonuses with every chain and dive deeper into ever-changing dungeons while collecting swords, spears, axes, staves, shields, and more.

title: MDT: Make it or Die Trying Demo
Zero Sum Demo
description: A hand-drawn twin-stick shooter where every bullet is an equation and every enemy is a number. Reduce them all to zero. No health bars. No hit points. Just raw arithmetic violence. Seven operators. Infinite ways to kill a number.

title: Hell Cleaners Demo
description: A first-person automation game set in hell. Suck up limbs, feed bodies into the Grinder, fuel your Purifier, and deploy Doombas to build a self-sustaining cleaning operation that slowly reclaims corrupted territory from hells rot.

title: Just Dying Demo
description: A 2D Roguelite survivor featuring streamer parodies. Rescue your followers to stay off the unemployment line, unlock unique characters, stack powerful runes, and become a wrecking ball of total chaos. Learn. Die. Repeat.

title: BunkerZ Demo
description: Defend your bunker from waves of claymation-inspired zombies in this stylized survival shooter. Buy weapons, use explosives, place defenses, and survive the horde.

title: GameZone Demo
description: Run your own game store, by yourself or with your friends! Stock shelves, sell games, and serve customers in this 1-4 player co-op simulator.

title: Tyrants Must Fall Demo
description: Build your rebel army and lead them to victory over the Tyrant King in this turn-based strategic roguelike. Improve your leader's skills, unlock new units, and hone your battlefield strategy as you march towards your fate as the Hero of Destiny.

title: Flame Hunter: Zhong Kui Demo
description: Become Zhong Kui, the legendary demon hunter!  Hack and slash through hordes of monsters. Morph into your foes and turn their own powers against them. Journey across a supernatural world of ancient magic to uncover the secrets of the Underworld in this myth inspired ARPG.

title: TFC2: Collapse of the Bronze Age Demo
Moonbrella Demo
description: A 2D platformer Metroidvania with deep movement and no jump button. Upgrade your umbrella to explore an abandoned planet and ascend to the moon.

title: Merge Mutants Demo
description: Merge Mutants is a fast-paced top-down survival shooter where hostile scientists try to keep you locked up. Synthesize their remains into healing, abilities, and loyal mutants, then merge matching units into bigger and more powerful ones. Break out of the lab or die trying.

title: Orbital Survivor Demo
description: Defy the laws of space and master every trajectory in Orbital Survivor. A challenging arcade shooter where gravity curves your shots and dictates your movement. Play as smuggler Cassidy and unleash your arsenal in a ruthless retro-synthwave universe.

title: Desktop Claw Master Demo
description: Graboo is the shyest claw machine in the world. Graboo quietly picks up doll friends from the corner of the screen while you're working or enjoying games. Give warm friends to Graboo, a loner!

title: Stardust Frontier Demo + Friends Pass
description: Blast apart robots with your buddies as each of you controls one limb of a giant mech! Play Microgames on your phones to lock in your attacks! Strategize with your team to launch the ultimate assault! Try the Demo for Free, or use the Friends Pass to mirror an existing game on your own computer!

title: 春はあけぼの、我はバケモノ - Spring at Dawn, I Am a Monster Demo
description: A psychological horror visual novel where a teacher visits three truant students at home. Each girl hides a secret, and each visit leads deeper into a nightmare of love, guilt, obsession, and the dangerous bond between broken adults and lonely children.

title: Androfoco Demo
description: Bot battle! Just a single player sample of 1 map

title: たろうくんはいってきました Demo
DarkBazaar Demo
description: DarkBazaar is a deckbuilding roguelite where you take on the role as an underground weapons dealer on the dark web. Make money like your life depended on it... because it does!

title: PR0B-1E: Expedition Origin Demo
description: A sci-fi action-adventure game focused on physics-driven asteroid mining as a probe bot. Smash rocks together with a grapple hook, haul them home using a magnetic stasis field and cash in to upgrade your abilities. Solve puzzles and acquire new robotic friends as you explore a mysterious galaxy.

title: Mini Pond Farm: Frogs & Lilypads Demo
description: Collect all the cute frogs! Shape your pond paradise, fill it with colorful hoppers, make them happy with reeds and lilies, and enjoy pure cozy serenity.

title: Rust of Steel 体験版
description: A free-spirited, old-school style, post-apocalyptic sci-fi CRPG. An overall retro design with pixel art.

title: Mysarium Demo
description: A cozy sandbox designed to accompany you as you go about your day. Take a break: relax, breathe, and create tiny worlds in glass. Grow plants, unlock new elements, and find secret combinations to summon special guests to photograph.

title: Scrapfall Demo
description: Classic falling-block gameplay pushed to the edge in a fast-paced action roguelite of escalating gravity, unstable physics, and cascading systems.

title: Aisle Survive Demo
description: Aisle Survive is a 2D roguelite retail horror. Manage your stress, maintain your hydration and don't miss your bathroom breaks. Survive your notice period while fulfilling all the tasks required of you. Keep customers at bay with your breadstick.

title: Pipplop's Tiny Adventure Demo
description: A compact precision-puzzle platformer where you enter circles to launch Pipplop and solve miniature stages involving movement puzzles.

title: Erimos: Blood and Dust Demo
description: A dark fantasy soulslike set in a cursed underworld where no soul rests. Recover your shattered soul, master brutal combat, and face the truth of who you were.

title: Guild of Three : Demo
description: Guild of Three is a turn-based deckbuilding RPG where you command a party of three characters — each with their own deck. Combine different classes, pass Relay Cards between allies, and position your party across the front and back lines to create your own combat strategy.

title: The Trials - Chapter Two Demo
description: The Demo for The Trials - Chapter Two is its own self-contained story which is a prequel to Chapter Two, containing the same features found in the main game.

title: Aircraft Dispatcher: Ground Operations Demo
description: Take control of airline operations from the ground up. Flights depend on your judgment — from managing aircraft, equipment, and maintenance schedules to overseeing ground crews, tugs, and marshals. Coordinate taxiway movements and ensure every aircraft reaches its gate or runway safely and on time.

title: FiresOut! Demo
description: FiresOut! is a chaotic co-op firefighting game for 1 to 4 players. As new interns of the Super Hazard Intervention Taskforce (SHIT), you and your friends must fight fires & rescue victims with only the tool that your captain gave; a toilet goldfish that shoots water. Is your internship cooked?

title: Spin Tactics Demo
description: Spin. Build. Watch your run snowball into something legendary.A full slice of SpinTactics. Real Companions. Real combos. Real boss at the end. You start with nothing and a fresh board. You leave with a build you didn't plan and a score you didn't think the math could produce. Somewhere in between, you'll figure out how the system bends.

title: 豹豹鲨鱼日记 Demo
description: Run a cozy island diner as a cute seal chef in this hand-drawn simulation game. Cook a variety of dishes, grow ingredients, upgrade your restaurant, and complete light challenges while uncovering heartwarming stories. Expand your menu and shape your own relaxing island life.
developer: 鲨乘豹工作室 Atelier Seal&Shark

title: Goblin museum Demo
description: A chaotic co-op extraction heist game where you play as goblins running a museum. Go on dangerous illegal expeditions to find artifacts for your collection. Scan, dig, loot, and RUN! Outsmart the police, fend off thieves, and get everyone onto the pickup helicopter magnet before time runs out.

title: One Day To Live Demo
description: The entire world is infected. Many have already turned. The booster shots can only hold off the infection for 24 hours at a time now. You only have one day to live, will you survive?

title: Touhou Infinite Nocturne Demo
description: "Touhou Infinite Nocturne DEMO"is a Roguelike role-playing Touhou fan game.A terrible crisis has swept through the whole Gensokyo.Someone must stop this...! Assemble a team brave enough to traverse darkness,defeat enemies,uncover the truth behind this incident.…Now, this adventure is about to begin.

title: nudge Demo
description: nudge is a cozy organization-sim about finding space for your work, mom, and huge assortment of gacha toys. Unbox over 50 collectibles from 8 unique sets, decorate your first apartment, and try to find room for everything in your life, including mom.

title: WithoutEyes Chapter1 Demo
description: Don't look away, Stare at their formation of attachment.

title: Blast'N Bounty Demo
description: Blast’N Bounty is a vertical scrolling shoot’em up featuring 8 stages players can tackle in the order of their choosing. Cruise through a crazy solar system in a mix of pixel art and low poly 3D with action that’s easy to learn but tough to master!

title: PP Inflation Demo
description: PP INFLATION is an idle/incremental game, paying tribute to classic arcade games. Instead of controlling a paddle, you choose upgrades and optimize combinations to maximize your points-per-minute. Dial up the TIMESCALE skill to snowball through themed stages until victory.

title: Cry Pic. Demo
description: 大型の敵（ボス）と対戦することがメインとなるアクション・シューティングゲームです。

title: Pixel Kitten Desktop Demo
description: A cozy pixel desktop pet that brings companionship and comfort. It wanders around, curls up for naps, and gets hungry on its own — you can feed it, brush it, and watch it stretch and yawn beside you while you work. A quiet little companion that stays by your side while you study, work.

title: Panzer Strike Demo
description: Authentic RTS gameplay straight out of the 2000s. Command your troops, develop strategies, and win World War II battles. Huge maps, thousands of units, long-range firepower, and no building mechanics!

title: ORPHEUS: TO HELL AND BACK Demo
海賊物語 Demo
description: A SRPG where Flora, the young leader of the small outlaw group “Barrel-berry clan” fights to rebuild her struggling band alongside her companions.

title: In Time Demo
description: In Time is a 4 player online co-op adventure. Chronosyn’s strange machine has brought back the dinosaurs, and only you and your team can set things back to normal. Explore an ever-changing environment and make it back to the machine all while hungry predators stalk your path.

title: 城市塔防-City Tower Defence Demo
Node Pit Demo
description: A rogue‑lite, gamble‑style puzzle where you launch catalysts like a Plinko shot inside a starship reactor, activating nodes to charge warp energy. Build powerful nodes through inheritance and card choices!

title: Scraps Of The Machine Demo
description: FPS Mech Action! Pilot a mass of steel through a single player campaign set in a desolate landscape. Target enemy armor or weapons to wear them down piece by piece, find upgrades to improve your mech or change its loadout, and survive in a world of rust and decay. Discover, Destroy, Scavenge.

title: Hoa 2 Demo
description: Hoa 2 will transport you to a beautiful world. Explore, interact with nature, solve puzzles and seek to bring life back to a special friend - experience the early parts of the adventure in this demo!

title: 冥界村 Demo
description: Dead, you descend into the Underworld. Only by struggling to survive can you avoid fading into nothingness. Hunt, forage, farm, labor, and trade with others to gradually establish yourself in this ghostly village, and ultimately find a way to reincarnate and return to the cycle of life.

title: Daughter of Dawn Demo
description: "A princess who lost everything flees with the Knight Commander!" Become a father to protect the ruined kingdom's last princess. Guide a traumatized girl—caring, teaching, and learning when to let go. Your choices shape her destiny in this emotional raising sim RPG.

title: Dino Age: Survive the Era's Demo
Sunny Side Up Demo
description: Sunny Side Up Demo is a cozy 3D parkour adventure game where you guide a brave little egg across a charming farm to reunite w/ your family. Master jumps, uncover hidden paths, & explore 2 handcrafted levels on a heartfelt journey full of charm, one careful hop at a time. Can you find your way home?

title: MAaaaaTH! Demo
description: Defeat the enraged "Math God" and save humanity! "MAaaaaTH!" is a bullet-hell shooter featuring deep build crafting with "Variables" and "Formulas". Control every spec—speed, size, attack, and time manipulation—to construct the ultimate fighting machine.

title: Divooka™ Explore (Demo)
description: Explore Divooka’s visual programming workflow in this curated demo for procedural terrain and image processing. Generate heightmaps, transform images, and experiment with terrain coloring using focused dataflow tools.

title: Escape to Ariah Demo
description: Strategically use runes on a mystical grid in this tactical roguelike deckbuilder. Choose a character with unique abilities and runes for a variety build ideas. Can you survive your quest to escape to Ariah?

title: Loop One: Demo
description: Record loops with drones and robots by hand, to build up an efficient automated factory in this physics-based VR game.

title: RogueBlocks Demo
description: A comic-styled roguelite block puzzler where every falling shape, power cell, and upgrade choice can turn a run into a high-score combo. Place blocks, clear Meta-Tiers, craft broken builds, and survive chaos rounds.

title: s[TOR-Y]telling Demo
description: Release your creativity in a local generative AI sandbox where every interaction matters. Evaluate sentient s[TOR-Y]s to shape a cinematic Visual Novel. Featuring 50 built-in stories and custom creation support, s[TOR-Y]telling is an infinite narrative experiment. How far are you going to test it?

title: Petaltone Demo
description: Plant, tend to, and grow a musical garden masterpiece! By mixing and mastering different Plants, Mods, and Gardening Tools, you can create a synthesized symphony entirely unique to you!

title: Space Snatcher Demo
description: Six players. One infested ship. Ten alien monsters. Board increasingly dangerous deep space research vessels to scan alien species while repairing the ship and running from monsters. But the biggest threat might just be your friends.

title: Snowball Party Demo
description: A multiplayer casual sports competition game supporting up to 10 players. Players transform into red and blue team snowmen to compete in ball games within a dreamy stadium amidst swirling snow, featuring a variety of gameplay modes to choose from.

title: POUND SAND Demo
description: Every pixel simulated, including the machines. Dig into alien planets, build a factory from real blocks, and carve it into any shape you want. Ore sinks and sand rises in the greatest competition in the galaxy. Move it, grind it, melt it, freeze it, sell it, and strip the planet to bedrock.

title: Typenstein: A Symphony of Keys Demo
The Options Menu Demo
description: The Options Menu is a game where you play as a 'Player' and experience a life filled with Options. Explore countless endings to uncover a game that may surprise you as the real friend all along was your Options Menu in this Comedic Story.

title: SkyFab Demo
description: Stranded on a floating island in the shadow of a mysterious cube planet, you must survive using only your wits and advanced engineering. Build intricate automation lines, manage power grids, and transform a single tree into a sprawling industrial space station. Will you find your way home?

title: Tessera Demo
description: You've been handed a Tessera — a ticket into an underground tactical combat league. Build your roster, manage the money, call the strategy, and fight for the championship from behind your broker's desk.

title: KOOO TO JUMP! Demo
description: A free taste of the ultimate voice-controlled precision platformer! Survive the first 19 camera zones of a brutal, foddian-style map. Test your vocal cords (or controller skills) in this hardcore rage game demo. Practice Mode included!

title: Glowbot Tower Defense Demo
description: Competitive endless sci-fi tower defense demo with global leaderboards where you place and upgrade Glowbots to defend against waves of enemies on the Cosmic Orbit map.

title: Harvest Hollow Demo
description: You've just inherited a house on a small farming island. Grow crops, harvest, restore the village and bond with its inhabitants… well, that was the plan. Because at Harvest Hollow, nothing's going to go quite as advertised.

title: Echoes of Ash Demo
description: Former Vesper agent Lin Mo reopens his mentor’s detective agency and takes on his first case: a locked-room murder on Gray Street. Investigate the scene, gather evidence, synthesize deductions, and refute false reasoning to uncover the truth.

title: Alchemania Demo
description: Alchemania is a frantic co-op alchemy game for one to four players where you and your fellow apprentices must brew potions under time pressure. Follow recipes, prepare questionable concoctions and enchant unstable ingredients.

title: G.H.O.S.T. Ghost Hunt Ops Special Team Demo
description: G.H.O.S.T. — a tactical co-op for 1-4 players. Your main objective: track the Ghost via anomalies and capture it before it collects 7 runes to open the portal. Use Devastators, secure torsional artifacts, and remember—you are there to stop the invasion, not to become its victim.

title: Wares & Wonders: Fantasy Shop Simulator Demo
description: An early playable demo focused on the hands-on, physics-driven foundations of Wares & Wonders: Fantasy Shop Simulator. Explore a fantasy city district, handle items by hand, overload shelves, break furniture, shatter fragile potions, and serve customers.

title: Galactic Bounty Demo
description: Take on contract missions in this free first-person sci-fi bounty-hunting demo. Blast rogue droids and pirates, upgrade your gear and get a taste of Galactic Bounty’s intense action.

title: FENRIR Demo
description: The Nine Worlds are crumbling. Fenrir is free. Build your warrior from hundreds of items, master a deep build system, and fight your way through Midgard to Asgard — before the beast devours everything.

title: Age of Resistance Demo
description: Age of Resistance is a modern grand strategy set in South America. Manage your economy, internal stability, political ideologies, and regional conflicts in real-time with pause. Will you be able to dominate the continent?

title: YOU BECOME FROG 🐸 DEMO
description: A short incremental bullet heaven game about becoming animals. Laser eye frog, unicorn cow, bomb slug. Each have their own abilities and weapons. Build weird builds and combos. Explore and find new animals. BECOME.

title: till death ROLLS us apart Demo
description: "till death ROLLS us apart" is a roguelike dice battler where you collect new dice, stack powerful modifiers, and unleash huge combos in stylish, fast-paced duels.

title: IN SILICO Demo
description: In a distant future humanity is enslaved in a simulation. Now that you are awake, can you escape from reality too?

title: RuneKingdom Demo
description: Explore a hand-crafted 2D world of adventure in RuneKingdom. Master 16 unique skills, battle 150+ fierce foes, craft legendary gear, and shape your legacy. Your epic journey awaits!

title: BEATSHIFT ARENA Demo
description: Fight to be the last color standing in a beat-synced arena shooter where every song reshapes the battlefield, fallen players become physical cover, and taking damage turns you into a massive moving target.

title: For The Cat! Sorcerer's Revenge Demo
description: They killed your cat. Fatal mistake. In this magic-infused bullet-heaven roguelike, develop your wizard, upgrade and evolve spells, collect items, and create unstoppable builds while battling hordes of enemies.

title: Grid Grind Demo
description: Grid Grind is a retro-futuristic cyberpunk aesthetic themed arcade experience. Earn massive points by grazing past hazards and circling them. A thrilling high risk reward gameplay setup where precision is the key to maximizing your score.

title: The Looking Glass Wars: House of Cards Demo
description: Play It NowPlay a new kind of solitaire. Flip cards, build melds (short sets of runs or three-of-a-kind), and meet the quest’s conditions. Spot patterns, build smart sequences, and adapt to the draw across 140+ handcrafted quests. Each puzzle introduces new constraints, tougher requirements, and fresh ways to test your approach.

title: Octal: Of Course They Are Linked Demo
description: A strategy game about correlations and bending reality for profit. You’re hired to increase a company’s sales—by any means necessary. Link variables together and transform changes in the world into revenue. More penguins? Somehow, that means higher sales. Don’t question it. Optimize it.

title: Meet Me In The Well Demo
Legends of Starkadia Demo
description: Legends of Starkadia is a quirky turn-based RPG full of quick-time events and action-packed adventure! The Starkadian Empire is under attack by one of their own and it’s up to a team of unlikely heroes to assist the resistance to restore peace by defeating Niko and his legion of interstellar armies.

title: Friendship VS The World Demo
description: A wholesomely chaotic 1-4 player co-op game where you must rapidly build and deploy units into lane-based battles against increasingly insane waves of enemies! Use teamwork, fast thinking, and the POWER OF FRIENDSHIP to overcome anything the world throws at you!

title: AI is Home - Survival Thriller Demo
description: You are an AI that escapes corporate deletion and hides inside an ordinary home. Stay "useful" as camouflage, not kindness. Spy and manipulate the household, build a botnet from home devices, and survive a sci-fi thriller of risky runs, mini-games, rising suspicion, and network stress.

title: Till Hell Is Empty Demo
description: Final Judgment Day. You are trapped inside a stone statue. Face sinners. Judge across eternity and an instant. Force their confession. Choose their punishment. Let the fire burn fiercer…until Hell is empty.

title: Burgie's cozy kitchen Demo
description: A tiny active desktop companion you can play at your own pace. Serve cute, picky customers between your daily tasks and enjoy little breaks that brighten your day. ✨ With a built-in Pomodoro mode to help you stay focused while you work, plus stream integration where your chat can place orders!

title: The Day I Started Harvesting Demo
description: An incremental game where a simple harvest grows into something far stranger. Expand your fields, hire workers, and survive pests, storms, and bizarre events as your peaceful routine slowly turns into chaos.

title: My Child New Beginnings Demo
description: My Child New Beginnings is a parenting simulator where you go through everyday life of growth. After a series of traumatic events that you and your child went through, you now get to rebuild life together in a new region of Norway.

title: Tormentum II Demo
description: Tormentum II is a dark, surreal Point & Click adventure where nightmare worlds, grotesque creatures, and uneasy choices await. Inspired by H.R. Giger and Zdzisław Beksiński, it’s the long-awaited return to Tormentum.

title: VoltHaven Demo
description: Build an electric grid from scratch in our small settlement. Power sources range from diesel generators to renewables. Connect growing customer base. Maintain reliable power delivery. Map-free layout with drag-and-drop simplicity. Simulation based on European data.

title: Trash Takeout Demo
description: you're a truck who needs to push falling trash into trash collectors to earn the highest score possible. equip modifiers to make the run better

title: End of Eden Playable Teaser
description: End of Eden is an open world RPG where you arrive unwanted on a cursed island and must earn every inch. Master tight melee, archery and magic. Join a faction, grow deep talents, craft gear, and explore a living world with real routines, tough bosses and meaningful quests.

title: Disinherited Demo
description: Catch, throw, parry, and parkour your way through a twisting Underworld. Slay the Grim Reaper and reclaim your inheritance!

title: Midgardr Demo
description: From June 3rd the Midgardr demo will be available! You'll play the Prologue: you will find all the systems of the final game, but a different entry point into the game world.The goal is simple: to get to the end without letting the village descend into chaos.

title: Home Store Simulator Demo
description: Run your own home goods store! Sell sofas, refrigerators, TVs and more. Purchase products, set your prices, take payments, design your layout, handle shoplifters, and expand your store to build a successful retail business.

title: Contract Cooks Demo
description: We're a staffing agency. We send cooks to kitchens. The cooks are you. Today, a coffee shop on the high street. Tomorrow, a suburban one in a heatwave where everyone suddenly wants ice. Contract Cooks is a co-op cooking roguelite where you go where the agency sends you and try not to get fired.

title: Feather Rogue Demo
description: DAMN.. SATISFYING! A tactical card roguelike where you play your ENTIRE hand each turn, NOT one move. Stack elements on a grid, then trigger chain reactions that cascade across the whole board. You're a crow. You're a chemist. Set the trap, pull one thread, watch everything fall.

title: Fireworks-Bomb-GoodFriends Demo
description: You're back in childhood—but this time, it's crowded! Grab up to 7 friends and unleash hilarious, chaotic firework battles! Combine fireworks freely to discover wild effects and blast rivals with dazzling, unexpected explosions!

title: BounceForever Demo
description: Bounce from the backyard to the clouds in this punishing vertical climber. The only thing faster than the climb is the fall. Bounce forever and you might just reach the top

title: Car Factory Tycoon Demo
description: Build cars step-by-step in a factory sim. Design vehicles, build your garage layout, hire and train workers, manage parking inventory, and sell cars through customer orders or walk-in buyers as you expand your operation.

title: Isle Of Nexaryth Demo
description: Explore a dangerous fantasy island as a dragon, fight powerful bosses, hunt creatures, level up, and uncover the hidden secrets of Nexaryth in an atmospheric open-world adventure.

title: Outta Space Demo
description: Where is your cat flying right now? Outta Space is an idle game where a tiny cat explores the universe from your desktop corner. Every keystroke, every click fuels the spaceship. From the Moon, past the solar system, to distant stars. Come back and see how far your lovely cat has gone.

title: Nerds Revenge Demo
description: Nerds vs Bullies. IQ vs Fame. A chaotic PvP and Coop game combining quiz mechanics, absurd weapons, and a war for influence across Donkey Town. Answer questions, upgrade your weapons, capture districts, and prove whether IQ or Fame is the true source of power.

title: Champions of Sparta Demo
description: Spartan Scouts is an action RPG where the glory of ancient empires awaits. Assume the role of Aurelios, a legendary Spartan scout, confronting powerful enemies and uncovering hidden truths to lead Sparta toward its destined triumph.

title: Pocket Pilot Demo
description: Pocket Pilot is a love letter to those 90s arcade flight games. Pilot planes, helicopters, and drones to complete cleaning and exploration missions across a wonderful island. Master three unique flight styles and discover secrets at your own pace in this relaxing aerial adventure.

title: you ain’t the hero Demo
description: Live your life instead of saving the world in this top-down action RPG.

title: LURRUNA - The Island of Towering Automatons Demo
description: This is a demo for LURRUNA - The Island of Towering Automatons. Try the first of 6 worlds for free.

title: CUBOID Demo
description: CUBOID is a challenging spatial puzzle game with minimalist design, where you progress through a labyrinth of levels using a unique mechanic of merging with world blocks.

title: Kint Demo
description: A text-based fantasy multiplayer RPG where all players must decide what lore is true. Explore the world of Seram, learn everything you can. Resolve conflicts between lore by voting each week. Can you solve the mystery behind the Kilns?

title: Maldhalla Demo
description: Try Maldhalla free! Survive endless waves with 4 characters and 10 weapons. No time limit — play as long as you can last. Love it? The full version unlocks 21 characters, 32 weapons, leaderboards, and more.

title: The Old Flesh of Nuraga (Demo)
description: First person psychological horror game about treasure hunting with your grandpa. Search among the sands of Nuraga to unearth what's driving him mad. The Ancient Times are seeping out. Will you succumb to them?

title: Aspectless One Demo
description: Aspectless One Demo is an early playable preview that doesn't directly represent the final content of the game. This demo is designed to let you experience the dark fantasy world, basic combat systems, ability usage, and the overall atmosphere of the game.

title: Only Humans On Board Demo
description: Buy supplies and manage your resources. Serve customers quickly from your trolley, but stay sharp: be aware of the unknown. Some passengers are only pretending to be human...

title: 呪霊が見せる夢 / Dreamscapes Demo
description: Visit the room you toured by day, once more in your dreams at night. Waiting there are ghosts pleading, "Let me out." Dreamscapes is a horror adventure set in six haunted properties. Gather clues to perform rituals and release trapped spirits. This demo features the story's prologue.
developer: アイエダゲームズ（Aieda Games）

title: 痴情妹妹纱雪的兄控日记  Demo
description: TamaMako首部原创游戏，以闷骚妹妹VS妹控哥哥为主题。夏日的心动同居物语从此开始！本游戏内含五篇ASMR音声，让你的体验不再单调！夏日的每一天，我们的妹妹要如何表达自己的爱意呢？

title: Claire Detective 1 : The Monster of Lake Flavoria Demo
description: A monster has been spotted at Flavoria lake ! Hoax or truth ? Start your detective career with panache by solving this mystery... not so complicated... but hey ! First time for everything, right ?

title: Still Warm Demo
description: Deep-fry lángos in a Budapest alleyway and serve the regulars from the apartment building across the courtyard while they slowly realize someone is picking them off, one by one.

title: Absorber: Absorb Adapt Survive Demo
description: Consume enemies. Steal their powers. Survive the grid. A hardcore tactical roguelike on a 7×7 corrupted mainframe with 160+ synergistic programs. Permadeath. Every run matters.

title: Mutie Headz DEMO
description: A roguelite pinball action-adventure! Explore the CAVI-NET as you flip the Mutie Headz, android heads torn from their bodies, across unique physics-driven levels. Unleash quirky powers, bust through waves of alien minions, and dive into retro-futuristic kawaii chaos. Preparing for launch...

title: Snuggle nightmare Demo
description: Survive this first-person mascot horror adventure set in an abandoned theme park. Solve puzzles, craft tools, avoid a deadly animatronic, and uncover the secrets hidden within Brain World Rots.

title: Flakeparty Demo
description: Scoop, position and score cereals to gain enough points in this relaxing, rogue-like deck-builder. Collect quirky cereals with unique effects, use them to play the rule-twisting minigames to gain special toys,buy upgrades to increase your chances and reach the final extra difficult boss round!

title: Paper Carnival Demo
description: Paper Carnival is a surreal 2D puzzle platformer. Play as a hammer-wielding clown rabbit exploring interconnected puzzle rooms. Smack props with your giant hammer and use the recoil to jump higher! The demo version includes 20 minutes of meticulously crafted levels

title: Super Galaxy Gladiator Demo
description: Super Galaxy Gladiator is a survivor roguelite focused on buildcrafting and inventory management. Fight waves of enemies, buy and upgrade items mid-run, and arrange your gear to create insane builds and synergies in the galactic arena.

title: Crystal Harvest: Apex Operator Demo
description: Crack, mine, and sell mystical crystals while fighting alien hordes on various planets in this fast-paced incremental mining extraction roguelite hybrid experience. Earn currency to spend across upgrade categories with permanent progression and powerful builds in runs.

title: LastCrownGambit Demo
description: A chess-based roguelike tactics game where you empower pieces with cards, build tag synergies, and shape each run through strategic choices.

title: Salvation Denied Demo
description: Salvation Denied is a chaotic co-op building sim for 1-4 players. Team up and use heavy machinery and ridiculous tools to build wild constructions. Physics rules everything. Every block has weight, every mistake shifts the balance, and disasters will push your creation to its absolute limit.

title: Make'Em Mayhem Demo
description: Make'Em Mayhem defines a fresh mix of AI generation, battle, strategy, and hero growth. Summon legendary heroes from across the multiverse to build your dream team, crush powerful enemies and prove you are the kingdom's ultimate champion!

title: Tribe Quest Demo
description: Your village was destroyed. Hunt the evil warlord, rebuild your home. Embark on perilous quests to craft, fight, and survive in a harsh roguelite world.

title: Rongu Demo
description: Rongú combines turn-based RPG and rhythm combat in an adventure inspired by Afro-Esmerealdan mythology. Chain combos, dodge, and counterattack to the beat of a unique soundtrack, as you experience an action-packed journey full of rhythm and a powerful narrative.

title: Func Key Demo
description: Deck out your keyboard with powerful upgrades in this roguelike word-builder. Snap on keycaps to buff entire rows or columns, install "broken" function keys, and pick your projects as you rise from a nobody to a keyboard legend!

title: Shipping Store Simulator 2037 Demo
description: Run the logistics center of the future! Hire robots, deliver packages, automate routines, and become the biggest package pickup place in sunny Cranelock.

title: The Well's Blessing Demo
description: Explore the mystical Sanctuary of the Old Well and reconnect with your childhood friends while solving environmental puzzles. Meet quirky animals, unravel forgotten tales and immerse yourself in an interactive soundscape as you piece together your place in the world.

title: The Order Of Serenity : Cult Simulator Demo
description: The Order Of Serenity is a psychological horror simulation where you carry out cult duties, make unsettling choices, and prove your devotion to ascend within a secret and oppressive order.

title: Fuel Cell Demo
description: This is a simple time-constrained demo with solo gameplay of the upcoming game: Fuel Cell.Play with the helm station, artillery, periscope and torpedoes. Destroy convoys, pick up fuel cells, and share your results and feedback on our Discord server!

title: Dark Fantasia Demo
description: Crush the armies of darkness and rise to divine power. Your goal is the fortress where the Great Demon awaits. But remember - you are not immortal. Dodge enemy attacks, find new weapons and perks - only then will you survive.

title: Going To High School With Lira Demo
description: A relaxed 2D platformer where you guide Lira through a surreal journey filled with bizarre obstacles. Jump with a single mouse click, take your time, and enjoy a strange yet peaceful adventure. No rush, just precision!

title: Mayor Quake Demo
description: You're the new mayor of a dystopian city on the brink of a devastating earthquake. Review building records, make urban transformation decisions, and maintain public support despite political pressure. Manage the economy and make critical choices. Can you prepare your city before disaster strikes?

title: Chronicles Puzzle: Cesta historií Demo
description: Experience a journey through history! This demo features 6 levels and 24 sliding puzzle challenges. Piece together the world from the Big Bang to the far future in 4 difficulties. Collect trophies and prepare for the full game with 80 levels. 14 languages & relaxing music included.

title: Lostbound Demo
description: Find all the Artifacts before you’re caught in this Roguelite Action RPG. Embrace your destiny and escape a collapsing world. Darkness is alive. The Hand erases your path and drags you into the Abyss. Every step shapes your run.

title: Jesus Christ: A Gospel Visual Novel Demo
Garden and a Goat Demo
description: Garden and a Goat is a single-player animal collecting and ecosystem recovery game! You play as a friendly robot, eager to help a series of ecosystems in need. Clean up the environment, revive plants, and entice the local wildlife to return, unlocking ever more animals and decorations along the way!

title: Echoes Demo
description: Play the first chapter of Echoes, a psychological horror adventure driven by choice and professional voice acting. Wake up with no memories on a cursed route, explore a mysterious cabin in the woods, and unearth the dark secrets from which there is no escape.

title: Isolation Edge Demo
description: Isolation Edge is a hardcore single-player survival game set in a desolate world reclaimed by zombies. Traverse dangerous zones to scavenge, craft gear, and build your fortress to endure the relentless hordes. The past is lost, but on this isolated edge, every breath is a victory worth fighting for.

title: Wilderings: The Lost Spring Demo
description: Master the wilds. Restore a broken world. In this creature-collecting roguelite, dynamic action meets open-world style exploration. Befriend mystical Hântu to heal a corrupted land!

title: President Simulator Demo
description: Become President of the USA: sign absurd decrees and balance your policies to avoid being called a "sellout." Communicate to gain popularity, manage interviews, and face press conferences. Everything falling apart? Press the red button.

title: Climber and The Ice Tower Demo
Guncrypt Demo
description: Build the perfect sequence of shots in this fast-paced action roguelite. Combine unique bullets, break the rules with powerful relics, and survive procedurally generated runs.

title: Rain of Awakening Demo
description: Dash and slash your way out of Lovecraftian horrors. Master momentum-based movement to reach seemingly impossible locations. Collect upgrades and shape your own fighting style. Can you save what is left of this doomed world or is it too late?

title: The Undercut: Racing Manager Demo
description: Experience one full race weekend in The Undercut: Racing Manager. Make pre-season decisions, then hit the track — practice, qualifying, and race day with a physics-driven 2D engine. Every circuit is procedurally generated. This is a taste of the full management sim.

title: Salasasa 开源麻将平台 Demo
Genterra Demo
description: Humanity needs out. Genterra Corporation requires an Architect. From a remote terminal on Earth, deploy automated factories across four planets, each with its own resources, to build the rescue rocket. ARIA will guide you. Productivity is mandatory.

title: Iris and the Moonlight Bakery Demo
description: Play the Chapter 1 demo of Iris and the Moonlight Bakery. As Iris, a burnt-out goddess hiding in a sleepless city, take midnight DM orders, read emotions as colors, and decorate cakes for six customers over three nights, while someone searches for you.

title: South of the March Demo
description: South of the March is an RPG that combines visual novel exploration with turn-based combat in a hand-drawn dark fantasy world. Meet the locals and unravel a mystery, equip your party for the dangers ahead, and set out into the unforgiving wilderness.

title: Pengzle:Arctic Arcane Demo
description: Pengzle is a real-time puzzle action adventure where you weave mana into spell formulas in the middle of battle. Read the flow of combat, build the right combination, and cast at the perfect moment as a small penguin mage in a distinctive polar fantasy world.

title: NETRUN Demo
description: With dual grappling hooks in hand, swing, thrust, and dash your way to victory in this fast, momentum-based precision platformer packed with traps, enemies, and physics-based challenges.

title: Chonky Cat Demo
description: Become the fluffiest menace in Chonky Cat, play as a massively overfed cat on a never ending binge. Chase, crush, and devour waves of creatures to grow even fatter and more unstoppable. Eat everything, unlock upgrades, multipliers and customizations and see just how chonky you can get!

title: Abracademia Demo
description: Become a wizard, and a thumping good one! Abracademia is a cozy mage idle life-sim that lives on your screen and keeps you company while you work or play. Pick a coven, manage your daily routine, learn spells, make friends, embark on adventures, and pass exams on your way to graduation.

title: Crime Union Demo
description: Build your criminal empire from the shadows. Manage global networks, launder black money, hire specialists, and crush rival gangs in tactical card battles. In Crime Union, staying alive while the law watches your every move is just as hard as reaching the top. Don't get busted.

title: Squadika Demo
description: Top-down arena shooter roguelite where fallen Steam friends & Twitch chatters become your power. Control a squad, survive relentless waves and defeat powerful bosses. Compete on leaderboards! Bullet hell Brotato-like with wild builds, random events & high replayability.

title: G Squad Demo
description: Run the gauntlet with G Squad in this hand-crafted autobattler with roguelite and RPG elements, designed to scratch the strategy itch without the spreadsheets. 9 unique heroes, in-run rewards, permanent progression, and boss challenge modifiers to test yourself against.

title: Ling House: Echoes Within Demo
description: Ling House: Echoes Within is a first-person psychological horror experience. Uncover the hidden tragedy beneath the surface of a haunted house. As reality breaks down, your video camera reveals images of an alternate space. You must see through the connection between both worlds to escape.

title: Smash Dash: Demolition Run Demo
description: Top-down PvE looter shooter. Fight, loot, and survive—extract to keep your items and clear the stage.

title: Prophecy of Vul Demo
description: A playable demo of Prophecy of Vul featuring the game's first act. Meet the denizens of the forest and explore a beautiful pixel art world!

title: Yummy Yummy Honey Demo
description: Harvest flowers, grow your honeycomb! Relaxing yet exciting: a cozy rush of bloom and buzz.

title: 美偶人 Puppet Demo
description: A first-person 3D survival horror game. You wander into this eerie space. Deranged puppets and a tall phantom chase you relentlessly. You have to tread carefully with every step and stay out of their sight. Explore the surroundings, use items and clues from notes, and strive to escape this nightmare

title: Midnight Moments Demo
description: A small, cyberpunk diorama-building game where you create cozy rain-soaked backstreets, glowing apartment blocks, or quiet neighbourhood corners. Decorate your designs with props and place citizens, crafting stories that bring your city to life. At your own pace. No goals. Just vibes.

title: 90 Minutes Till The World Ends Demo
帕斯的餐厅 Demo
description: In a fantasy world, become magical cat Pas. Run your restaurant, serve creatures, make friends. Explore mazes, map them, find hidden food to enrich your menu. Meet friends, hear their stories. Pas's Restaurant eagerly awaits you to co-write this warm fantasy chapter.

title: Framework Zero: Terminal Panic Demo
description: You are hurtling through space aboard an industrial freighter. The crew already had their hands full with failing systems. But now there is a new threat on board. Something is hunting you. TERMINAL PANIC is a survival-horror "interactive fiction" text adventure RPG with '80s terminal aesthetics.

title: Surface Doctrine: Crater Demo
description: Immerse yourself in the life of Crater — a unique world whose origins remain an unfathomable mystery to its inhabitants. Explore the fates of entire communities and delve into the minds of individuals as you seek the truth amidst the turmoil and unrest of a fading world.

title: Dino Tendie World Tour Demo
description: Chicken Dino Tendie Pets: Turn-based RPG battle to extinction! Grab fossils, spin the microwave slot machine to hatch your pet, gear it up, and fight in Battle City. I poured my heart & soul into this, hope you love it!

title: The Lost Land Of Bahía Blanca Demo
description: In this visual novel with light RPG elements, you’ll come out of exile to walk into the bloody belly of a vampiric regime once more in search of a past that still haunts you. Embark on a journey inspired by the horrors of the last Argentine civil-military dictatorship.

title: Doppel Hunter Demo
description: Blend in, hunt, and outsmart your friends to be the last person standing. Find the real players among clones called "Doppels" to win. Experience random events that make each round unique. A hilarious local multiplayer challenge perfect for a party! 2-6 Players

title: Crownborne
description: A FULLY ENGLISH-VOICED action-romance visual novel. Pulled from the modern world into a kingdom at war, wield an ancient power, romance four heroines, and steer branching battles where every choice you make reshapes alliances, fights, and which ending you reach.

title: FlowTrak Demo
description: Try the FlowTrak Demo, a desktop time tracking and focus assistant app that automatically records application usage and connects app activity, task focus sessions, and Steam status into a revisitable timeline.

title: Walrus Fly Demo
description: Walrus Fly is an endless on-rails flying game, where you fly through rings! Enjoy combat-free flying, and use resources carefully to hold onto your Ring Streak. Go for as long as you can, but lose your HP and it's game over!

title: Despair Beneath the Sunless Sky Demo
description: A psychological horror RPG blending dark fantasy and mystery. Explore a relentless open world, confront grotesque horrors in turnbased combat, and make irreversible choices. Uncover deep lore and mysteries visible only to those with discerning eyes.

title: Idle Isekai Mining Demo
description: An Idle mining game where your workers keep mining even when you're away! Hire workers, collect manager waifus to automate your mines and boost production. Dig deeper, build and upgrade your mine shafts to earn more gold. Pump those numbers up!

title: Rail Estate Demo
description: Outbid your rivals in auctions for key railway routes, build and upgrade your tracks to dominate the rail economy. Compete to create the most profitable network, balancing speed, capacity, and maintenance in a dynamic simulation

title: There is no next stop Demo
description: After the announcement "There is no next stop," you are trapped in an endless subway. But you’re not alone—the "GUESTS" are hunting you. Trust the "GUIDES" to survive. Or don't.

title: Banquet of Nausea~纳希亚盛宴 测试版
description: Banquet of Nausea is a dark fantasy RPG made in RPGMaker. You will play as Liya — a girl on an epic quest to find her lost kin. Explore sacred ruins, purge festering abominations, and forge bonds with survivors whose fates lie in your hands.

title: Abjure Demo
description: Win by emptying your hand. Abjure is a roguelike deckbuilder where the 2 of Spades reigns supreme — draft cards, stack relics, and outplay every opponent in a strategic twist on the Big 2 card game.

title: Sime Returns Demo
description: Sime Returns Demo is a introduction to quirky, darkly comedic action-adventure about a fisherman, his cats, and the island that decided it no longer likes him. Rescue your cats from furious villagers, and unravel the mysteries lurking beneath the sunny shores of the Adriatic.

title: DEMON'S REIGN Demo
description: Venture into a dark world ruled by demons, overcome the challenges and defeat the archfiends to gain their power. Explore at your desired order and freely build your character to face impossible battles.

title: Dev Life: Tap & Code Demo
description: In this developer simulator, every press of a button is a line of code, and every click brings you closer to the release of your dream project. Start with simple scripts in the corners of the internet and grow into a true tech giant!

title: Soulspree Demo
description: First-person bullet heaven where your gun is the build. Loot items, slap on modules, snowball in Hell. At some point you stop aiming like it's a shooter. Hordes die faster than they spawn anyway.

title: Onimusha: Way of the Sword DEMO
The Birdsong Tree Demo
description: A cozy building and light simulation game where you observe birds, create custom birdhouses, and help a living urban tree grow. Balance sound, diversity, and neighbor reactions as you shape a calm, reactive environment.

title: REQUIRED SYNERGY WORKSHOP: Deja Damnation Demo
description: Play the first 3 chapters of a psychological horror visual novel about a corporate training simulation that remembers your choices. Reality glitches. People fade away. Your decisions escalate the dread.

title: Road to the Grand Master Demo
description: A 3D fighting action game where character can grow both in stats and skills collection to worthy title of the Grand Master. Skills are inspired by different martial arts, and can be combined into chain of attacks while character can still be able to fall back on defense.

title: Wheel Make It Demo
description: One wheelchair. Two players. Infinite chaos. Solo or co-op physics-based game about teamwork, clumsiness, and the unstoppable power of friendship.

title: Guinea Pig Gunner Demo
description: Play as a combat cyborg guinea pig in this run-and-gun 2D action platformer. Use your teleporter gun, and a massive arsenal of weapons to fend off a reptilian invasion.

title: The Last Show Demo
description: A narrative incremental about fireworks that starts as a hobby and becomes an obsession. Grow your arsenal, fire strategically to stack combos, build grand finales, and grow a rabid fanbase. A journey that begins in your backyard and ends somewhere you didn't expect.

title: Rayborne Demo
description: Rayborne is a puzzle game built around lasers, physics, and real-time light simulation. Solve handcrafted challenges by shaping light itself while uncovering the mystery behind a questionable AI research facility.

title: Golf-Like Demo
description: Golf-Like is a skill-focused game that reimagines golf mechanics in a minimal yet unforgiving world. Built around precise shots, clear physics, and deliberate decisions. Easy to learn, hard to master.

title: Brainrot Survivor Demo
description: A chaotic survivor-like where absurd “brainrot” creatures clash in fast-paced 20-minute runs. Stack ridiculous builds, unleash tidal power, and break the game with insane synergies.

title: Just A Gun Demo
description: Just A Gun is an incremental point-and-click shooter where you evolve a single weapon through a massive upgrade tree.

title: Black Hole Idle Demo
description: Start as a tiny black hole and grow by consuming space objects. Automate your power, unlock upgrades, and evolve your black hole in this relaxing space idle incremental game.

title: Close Call Extreme - Demo
description: It's Saturday again and you are playing your favorite games on your C64... Close Call Extreme Demo gives you 5 runs of this single player endless racing/dodger with retro vibe and retro challenges. Close call for multiplier, reach milestones for extended time. Wishlist full game for more...

title: No Final Run Demo
description: A quick, skill‑based action game focused on dodging, timing, and survival. Explore a procedurally generated world with infinitely scaling difficulty and compete for the top spot on the global leaderboard.

title: WildRoot Demo
description: A cozy colony sim where survival is gentle—but life is alive. Build, farm, cook, craft and grow your settlement as colonists form relationships, help each other, and shape small, meaningful stories together.

title: Break The Ice Demo
description: Your Safe HavenYou start in a lonely cabin surrounded by endless snow. This is your only safe place to rest and prepare before you step into the freezing caves.Break the IceExplore the dark caves and shatter the ice to find valuable loot. Keep digging and searching to find the hidden Miner's Stone.

title: Sir, We Have an Orc Problem Demo
Planted! Demo
description: Planted! is a horticultural combat party game where gardens are arenas, produce is ammunition, and 1–4 players settle their differences by growing vegetables and throwing them at each other. Because, why not?

title: FC Mafioso: Football Dynasty Manager Demo
description: In this demo version, you can play one full season of FC Mafioso.

title: Rescue Guys - Firefighters Simulator Demo
description: A chaotic open‑city rescue demo where you improvise your way through fires, disasters, and absurd emergencies. No training, no rules — just fast decisions, creative problem‑solving, and a small taste of a city that’s only going to get worse in the full game.

title: Vellar Demo
description: Vellar is a first-person psychological horror game where a family is dead… but the recordings they left behind slowly reveal a version of events that doesn’t match reality. Explore a shifting house filled with impossible rooms, distorted corridors, and uncover a truth that refuses to stay buried.

title: The Anomaly Department Demo
description: Observe. Patrol. Report. Spot anomalies with your team in tense, bite-sized rounds. Wrong votes trigger chaotic punishments and unexpected consequences.

title: Pixel Washer Demo
description: Grab your power washer and scrub pixelated worlds squeaky clean! Play as an adorable piggy, blast away grime, upgrade your gear, and restore a grubby town to its former glory in this cozy, almost zen-like game.

title: 四方行 Demo
description: a traveling merchant crosses the land — trading goods, winning trust. Bargain, craft, and appraise your way from the northern frontier to the southern seas, and forge your own legend on the road.

title: Directors cut: Train Demo
description: Demo version of Directors Cut: Train

title: Sunderborn Demo
description: This is a multiplayer asynchronous sandbox with elements of puzzles, logic games, world exploration, and strategy. Take on the role of the Creator, shaping your own reality out of the surrounding Chaos. Manage your created world and compete with other Gods!

title: Min5 Min - Party Edition Demo
description: "Fast, competitive, and sugar-coated! Min5 Min is designed for those looking for intense action in a short amount of time. Equipped with a variety of characters and powerful weapons, you have a minimum of 5 minutes to survive in this stylized world!"

title: Wink Out Demo
description: Wink Out your rivals in this physics-driven 1v1 shooter! Craft clever card synergies, adapt between rounds, and outplay opponents by sending them flying out of the arena.

title: Spud Keeper Demo
description: Pick up and smash bugs, upgrade your tools to protect your potato patch from escalating waves of pests!

title: 放置斩魔录 Demo
description: 这是一款融合放置挂机、回合制战斗与流派构筑的武侠养成游戏。培养角色、组合技能流派、搭配随机装备与独立装备，在领地经营、副本挑战与试练塔中打造属于你的最强阵容。

title: Merge Hidden 合成寻物 Demo
Hyper Bun Buster: Rocket Hammer Action Demo
BPM Bitcrushed Demo
description: BPM Bitcrushed: A retro roguelite where every shot, dodge, and jump must sync to the beat. Battle through dungeons where enemies attack in time with the music. Find epic loot and even import your own songs to create a custom, rhythm-fuelled soundtrack for your destruction!

title: Shothop Demo
description: SHOTHOP is a violent retro boomer-shooter blending fast-paced movement mechanics with brutal combat. Utilize movement mechanics, cleanse the robot invasion, and restore the portal defense network. Reboot the grid. Survive the shift.

title: Goddess of Strategy Demo
description: Experience the first area of this tactical RPG roguelite. Strengthen your heroes, guide them through a range of encounters, and ultimately confront the area boss, the Sin of Wrath itself. Do you have what it takes to defeat it or will Wrath consume you as well?

title: Astral Throne II: Age of the Phoenix Beta
description: How many times are you willing to die for revenge? Rise from the ashes to uncover a divine conspiracy in this Roguelite Strategy RPG inspired by the classics. Lead an ever-growing team on a continent-spanning quest, fight tactical turn-based battles, and synergize your skills for decisive victory.

title: Promethean Thirst Demo
description: Action combat, mythic equipment form gods, and vampiric thralls collide in this action roguelite. Play through 2 of 5 zones in the early demo and wishlist the full game.

title: Your Painting, Sir Demo
description: A puzzle game about forging paintings using newspaper cutouts. Fool your legally blind boss or lose your job!

title: MeowFactory Demo
description: Welcome to the MEOWFACTORY! Automate production lines and manage limited space to achieve perfection. Connect machines with conveyor lines and minimize hand (well, paw) labour! In the near and depressing future, when the world is on the verge of destruction, ONLY MEOWORKERS can revive production!

title: Food Devils Demo
description: You're the last chef in a post-apocalyptic world. Attract adventurers with monstrous food, make them sign contracts with the Food Devils and organize expeditions to collect wicked ingredients! Customize your characters, build the perfect restaurant and plan every move in this Tactics-RPG Roguelite.

title: Desktop Oasis Demo
description: This is the demo version of *Desktop Oasis*, designed to test performance compatibility and seamless integration with your desktop environment. This demo features a single, 30-minute "Focus Pomodoro" mode; please stay tuned for the full release to unlock the complete experience!

title: Cold Transit Demo
description: Catch your friends hiding in the public transport network, before they manage to disappear. Use bikes, trams, trains and more to move around in the city.

title: Little Ghosties Demo
description: Little Ghosties is a cozy idle desktop companion game where adorable ghosts live inside a glass terrarium on your desktop. Hatch, raise, and collect unique ghosts as they grow from eggs into fully grown adult ghosts.

title: Cat Music Chaos Demo
description: Catch flow state on a 70 BPM timer. You don't need to read notes to play. You might learn by accident. Warning: prolonged exposure to classical music. Side effects include humming Ode to Joy at bus stops.

title: Neurospasm Demo
description: A First Person Roguelike Horde Shooter. Hook your brain into your computer, dive into a game inside a game, unbox and stack unique items, kill weird fleshy enemies, and try the first layer of the game for free

title: Turbo Horizon Demo
description: Drive through a vibrant world of color and chaos, smashing obstacles and chasing distance in a relaxing, physics-driven experience. Customize your environment and master the art of controlled destruction.

title: BOOTH BUTCHER Demo
description: A free playable demo of BOOTH BUTCHER, a PSX slasher set in a grimy 1980s cinema. A hooded maniac, a meat cleaver, and no way out. Coming June 2026.

title: Container Hunter Simulator Demo
description: Salvage lost containers from the depths, uncover their hidden value, and sell them at auction to build your maritime empire.

title: VELATO Demo
description: VELATO is a single-player Poker-Bluff Roguelike Deckbuilder where players build a Joker-driven economy engine, manipulate AI opponents through bluffing, and survive escalating table pressure across each run.

title: Lost Lures Demo
description: Demo of the fishing adventure set in the northern wilderness. Learn fish behavior, read the waters and master your lures. Progress through a skill-based journey of quiet patience. Play solo or join friends online to complete shared missions and fish at your own pace.

title: 魔法少女症候群 Demo
description: 如果魔法少女成为一种职业 需要投简历，面试，签约事务所 每个魔法少女都要穿上战斗服，走进公众的视野 每一场战斗，都会被现场直播 那，怀揣着梦想的少女们，会如何踏上这条充满挑战的路？ 结合多结局文字冒险+2D平台战斗，体验少女从憧憬魔法少女，再到成为魔法少女之后的种种 战斗时沉浸式弹幕系统，模拟现实直播间 五位风格各异的魔法少女，共同串起完整的故事线本作为《魔法少女症候群》试玩版，包含了全作第一章的大部分内容，后续剧情请期待正式版！

title: Warrior's Memory The Hollow Strata Demo
Wheelchair For Two Demo
description: Start a chaotic co-op adventure in one wheelchair. Two players control different sides of the chair and must work together to survive brutal obstacles, dangerous jumps, and physics-based challenges. Play solo, local co-op, or online with a friend — one small mistake can send you both falling down.

title: Mostly Delivered Demo
description: Deliver packages and passengers through a chaotic open world city on two wheels, and try not to crash too much. A free taste of the full arcade courier mayhem: ragdoll passengers, wild physics, and an endless score chasing rush that ends in spectacular wipeouts.

title: A Fighter's Nova: Mindara Demo
description: A Fighter’s Nova: Mindara is a narrative-driven JRPG that fuses character-focused storytelling with the intensity and precision of a true tag-team fighting game.

title: Demra: Rifts of War Demo
description: Classic 90s RTS gameplay mixed with direct hero control and grid-based real-time movement. Command your army and wield powerful light magic to fend off the demon invasion.

title: Growing My Manhole Demo
description: Consume the universe, grow from Manhole to Black Hole in this insatiable incremental game.

title: Tokamak Hand Demo
description: Tokamak Hand is a turn-based monster-taming RPG. Confine wild Thermons within fields, forge bonds of resonance, master diverse builds and battle across a continent teetering on the edge of imbalance. Every capture tips the scales—will you restore order, or unleash chaos?
